    Sign in

    Introducing Surface Laptop Ultra

    Not standard issue.

    Uncompromising craft meets raw power. Built for world makers who demand cutting-edge performance and portability.

    Get updates

    Be the first to know

    Surface Laptop Ultra belongs in the hands of makers. Join us and stay in the loop.

    I will receive information, tips, and offers about Surface Laptop Ultra and other Microsoft products and services. Privacy Statement.

    Design

    Surface Laptop Ultra is remarkably light, thin, and portable. It’s less than 18mm thick, and weighs under 4.5 pounds (2 kg). Available in Platinum and a striking new Nightfall1 finish.

    Display

    Built for pros who make critical color and exposure decisions. The 15-inch mini-LED PixelSense Ultra touchscreen features a taller 3:2 aspect ratio, stunning 262 ppi, and up to 2000 nits of peak HDR brightness.

    Battery

    Surface Laptop Ultra delivers all-day battery life that maintains performance even while running on battery power.2 And its compact charger is small enough to fit in your jacket pocket.

    Precision Haptic Touchpad

    The new Surface Laptop Ultra touchpad is over 30% larger* — for precision in creative workflows and fine cursor control with haptic feedback in supported features and apps.

    Ports

    A full set of maker-friendly ports include USB-C®, USB-A, HDMI, headphone jack, and a full-size SD card reader. No dongles necessary.

    All-new NVIDIA Silicon.

    A new NVIDIA chip combines an ultra-efficient CPU with a powerful RTX GPU to deliver up to one petaflop of AI compute. A new kind of power for world makers, built to create what’s next and run the latest games.3

    All-new thermal system for heavy workloads.

    Surface Laptop Ultra is specially designed for sustained high performance. The all-new thermal system has up to 2.5x the thermal capacity of Surface Laptop 15-inch (7th Edition).

    A new class of GPU for AI.

    Powered by a new NVIDIA chip that unites local AI agents, creation, and gaming together in a platform built for the next wave of Windows PC experiences.

    The cure for token anxiety.

    Run AI models locally to help you move faster, experiment freely, and manage your cloud costs. When you need frontier-scale intelligence, scale up to the cloud and tap into the latest models.

    Up to 128GB unified memory.

    Unified memory and powerful GPU compute can help you run larger models and datasets directly on-device, enabling greater privacy and lower latency.

    Creative AI workflows.

    Apps can take advantage of Surface Laptop Ultra's powerful GPU to run AI-powered noise reduction, intelligent masking, video upscaling, and AI-assisted code completion directly on-device.4

    Designed for serviceability.

    Internal wayfinding makes repairs straightforward, so you can keep your device in-service with published repair guides and replacement parts available for purchase.**

    Replaceable SSD.

    For makers who value longevity and control. A user-serviceable storage drive means the device grows with the user and reduces IT friction in managed environments.**

    Privacy

    Process sensitive work directly on-device with greater control and lower latency than cloud-based alternatives.

    Security

    Hardware-rooted security for enterprise-grade protection of credentials, keys, and firmware.

    Authentication

    Windows Hello offers enhanced security with facial recognition for effortless, password-free sign-in.

    This product is subject to FCC regulations and has not yet been authorized. Shipment is conditioned on successful FCC equipment authorization. FCC rules do not address applicable consumer protection or contract rights. If authorization is not obtained, applicable purchase terms (including any refund rights) will govern.

    1. [*]

      Compared to Surface 7th edition laptop.

    2. [**]

      Replacement components available through online Microsoft Store and iFixit for out-of-warranty repair. Components can be replaced by individuals with the knowledge and experience to repair electronic devices following Microsoft’s Service Guide.
      Microsoft tools (sold separately) may also be required. Availability of replacement components and service options may vary by product, market, and over time. See [Self-repair information for your Surface device - Microsoft Support].

    3. [1]

      Available colors vary by configuration, market, and retailer.

    4. [2]

      Based on internal testing of pre‑release units. Battery life will vary significantly with final software, usage, settings, and other factors.

    5. [3]

      Accessories and some apps sold separately.

    6. [4]

      In supported apps.
